description: Daily backtest ROI tracking. Each entry records the best recommendation_roi achieved on that date.

history.notes: EXECUTION FAILURE: Python実行が自動スケジュールタスク環境でブロックされました。raw data同期もbacktestも実行できませんでした。最新rawデータは2026-03-26まで。2026-03-28のデータは未取得。次回実行時にPermission設定を確認の上、手動でpython許可を追加してください。

NO IMPROVEMENT (2 runs). baseline_daily: 0 bets (null ROI) because no race on 2026-03-30 had required_first_lane=1 candidate. Run 1 (trials 01-05): --clear-derived-filters variants all gave 30d ROI -0.46 to -0.30, far below baseline 5.9. Run 2 (trials 06-10): structural relaxation — trials 06-07 (min_top_win 0.58/0.55, keep 1-4-6 lanes) got 8 bets 30d ROI 5.0375 (worse); trials 08-10 (remove 2nd/3rd lane constraints, min_top_win 0.60-0.70) yielded identical 7 bets 30d ROI 5.9 as baseline (no change). monthly-roi strategy unchanged.

NO IMPROVEMENT. baseline_daily: 1 bet, ROI=0.8 (hit). baseline_30d: 7 bets, ROI=-0.742857 (1 hit, return=180 on 700 invested). Trials 01-05 all produced identical results to baseline. Trial 01 (min_top_win=0.60) and Trial 02 (min_top_win=0.55): relaxation had no effect because existing 7 races already pass the original 0.63 threshold. Trial 03 (remove third lane): intended to pass --required-first-lane 1 --required-second-lane 4 without third lane, but CLI behavior keeps preset required_third_lane=6 unless --required-third-lane 0 is explicitly passed. Trial 04 (max_market_odds=50): all 7 bets had odds <= 50 already. Trial 05 (min_probability=0.05): all 7 bets had probability >= 0.05 already. Strategy unchanged. Note: 30d window (2026-03-03 to 2026-04-01) was a losing period for the 1-4-6 lane strategy. To try removing third-lane constraint in future, use --required-third-lane 0.

NO IMPROVEMENT. baseline_daily: 0 bets (null ROI) — no race on 2026-04-02 passed 1-4-6 lane + min_top_win=0.63 filters. baseline_30d: 8 bets, ROI=5.2625 (2 hits, 25% hit rate). Trials 01-05: Trial 01 (--required-third-lane 0): daily 8 bets ROI=-1.0, 30d 316 bets ROI=-0.32; Trial 02 (--required-second-lane 0 --required-third-lane 0): daily 15 bets ROI=-1.0, 30d 661 bets ROI=-0.25; Trial 03 (--min-top-win-probability 0.58): still 0 bets daily; Trial 04 (--required-third-lane 0 --min-top-win-probability 0.58): daily 9 bets ROI=-1.0, 30d 431 bets ROI=-0.29; Trial 05 (--required-second-lane 0 --required-third-lane 0 --min-top-win-probability 0.60): daily 18 bets ROI=-1.0, 30d 837 bets ROI=-0.37. All relaxations dramatically worsened 30d ROI from +5.26 to negative. Lane filter 1-4-6 is critical for positive ROI. Strategy unchanged. odds_refresh.remaining_missing=13 (venue 08 data not available).

NO IMPROVEMENT. baseline_daily: 0 bets (null ROI) — no race on 2026-04-03 passed 1-4-6 lane + min_top_win=0.63 filters. baseline_30d: 7 bets, ROI=-0.742857 (1 hit, return=180 on 700 invested). Trials 01-05 all aimed at tightening filters to reduce losing bets. Trial 01 (min_top_win=0.68): daily 0 bets, 30d 6 bets ROI=-0.70 (marginal improvement). Trial 02 (min_top_win=0.70): same as T01 — daily 0 bets, 30d 6 bets ROI=-0.70. Trial 03 (max_market_odds=50): no change, 30d still 7 bets ROI=-0.742857. Trial 04 (max_market_odds=45): no change, 30d still 7 bets ROI=-0.742857. Trial 05 (min_top_win=0.65 + max_market_odds=55): no change, 30d still 7 bets ROI=-0.742857. Adoption criteria requires 単日 roi > baseline_daily, but all trials produced 0 daily bets (null) same as baseline. Strategy unchanged. Note: T01/T02 show mild 30d improvement (-0.70 vs -0.742857) by filtering 1 marginal bet, but not enough to adopt without daily improvement. odds_refresh.remaining_missing=13 (2026-04-02 venue data 12 missing + 2026-03-30 1 missing).

NO IMPROVEMENT. baseline_daily: 0 bets (null ROI) — no race on 2026-04-04 passed 1-4-6 lane + min_top_win=0.63 filters (venue 18 also missing 12 races). baseline_30d: 5 bets, ROI=-0.64 (1 hit, return=180 on 500 invested). Trials 01-05: T01 (min_top_win=0.60): daily 0 bets, 30d same 5 bets ROI=-0.64; T02 (min_top_win=0.58): identical; T03 (min_top_win=0.55): identical; T04 (max_market_odds=55): identical; T05 (min_top_win=0.60+max_market_odds=55): identical. All adjustments to min_top_win_probability and max_market_odds produce exactly same results as baseline — the 1-4-6 lane filter completely dominates which bets are made. Within the 30-day window, only 5 races pass the lane filter regardless of probability/odds adjustments. Strategy unchanged. odds_refresh.remaining_missing=25 (venue 18 data 12 races + prior date 13 missing).

NO IMPROVEMENT. baseline_daily: 0 bets (null ROI) — no race on 2026-04-05 passed 1-4-6 lane + min_top_win=0.63 filters. baseline_30d: 11 bets, ROI=3.554545 (2 hits, 18.2% hit rate). Trials 01-05: T01 (min_top_win=0.60): daily 1 bet ROI=-1.0 (lost); T02 (min_top_win=0.55): daily 1 bet ROI=-1.0 (same bet, lost); T03 (required_third_lane=0): daily 11 bets ROI=-0.818182 (1 hit, 9 losses — consistent with historical pattern of lane relaxation hurting ROI); T04 (max_market_odds=50): 0 bets, no change; T05 (min_top_win=0.60+max_market_odds=55): 1 bet ROI=-1.0 (same as T01). All trials with bets had negative single-day ROI. 30d baseline is healthy at ROI=3.55, not run for trials to avoid risk of degradation (historical pattern: lane relaxation → negative 30d ROI). Strategy unchanged. odds_refresh.remaining_missing=25 (2026-04-02 venue 12 missing + 2026-04-04 venue 12 missing + prior 1 missing).

IMPROVEMENT ADOPTED. required_third_lane=0 + min_top_win_probability=0.65. Daily ROI improved from -1.0 to 4.90 (7 bets, 2 hits, profit=3430). 30d ROI improved from -0.85 to -0.0623 (284 bets, 14 hits, profit=-1770). Baseline strict 1-4-6 had only 12 bets in 30d period and was deeply negative. Removing 3rd lane constraint while tightening min_top_win=0.65 significantly increases bet count while improving quality. First adoption of lane relaxation — monitor for stability before permanent config change. odds_refresh.remaining_missing=25 (2026-04-02 venue 12 + 2026-04-04 venue 12 + prior 1).

NO IMPROVEMENT. baseline_daily: 5 bets, ROI=-1.0 (0 hits). baseline_30d: 245 bets, ROI=-0.3086 (12 hits, 4.9% hit rate). Trials 01-05 all had daily ROI=-1.0 (0 hits), failing the 単日 ROI > baseline condition. T01 (min_top_win=0.70): daily 3 bets ROI=-1.0, 30d 116 bets ROI=+0.1552 — significant 30d improvement but daily test fails. T02 (min_top_win=0.68): daily 5 bets ROI=-1.0, 30d 164 bets ROI=+0.0329 — moderate 30d improvement but daily fails. T03 (max_odds=50): daily 5 bets ROI=-1.0, 30d 233 bets ROI=-0.3442 — both worse. T04 (min_ev=0.15): identical to baseline. T05 (required_second_lane=4): identical to baseline. Key observation: T01 (min_top_win=0.70) shows promise with 30d ROI turning positive (+0.155 vs -0.309), cutting bets by 53% while retaining 10/12 hits. Monitor this pattern — if it repeats over next 1-2 days with positive daily ROI, consider adopting min_top_win=0.70. Strategy unchanged. odds_refresh.remaining_missing=24 (2026-04-04 venue 12 + prior 12 missing).

NO IMPROVEMENT. baseline_daily: 6 bets, ROI=-1.0 (0 hits). baseline_30d: 236 bets, ROI=+0.235169 (16 hits, 6.8% hit rate, profit=+5550) — now positive! Trials 01-05 all had daily ROI=-1.0 (0 hits), failing the 単日 ROI > baseline condition. T01 (min_top_win=0.70): daily 3 bets ROI=-1.0, 30d 121 bets ROI=-0.0661 — 30d worse than baseline +0.235 (T01 hurts 30d when current strategy already positive). T02 (min_top_win=0.68): daily 4 bets ROI=-1.0. T03 (max_odds=50): daily 6 bets ROI=-1.0 (identical). T04 (max_odds=55): daily 6 bets ROI=-1.0 (identical). T05 (top_win=0.70+max_odds=55): daily 3 bets ROI=-1.0. Key observation: baseline 30d is now solidly positive (+0.235 with 236 bets, 16 hits). The T01 (min_top_win=0.70) pattern from 2026-04-08 run shows 30d ROI deteriorates compared to baseline when baseline is already positive — do NOT pursue min_top_win=0.70 adoption anymore. Current strategy (required_third_lane=0, min_top_win=0.65) is stable with positive 30d ROI. Strategy unchanged. odds_refresh.remaining_missing=25.

NO IMPROVEMENT. baseline_daily: 6 bets, ROI=-1.0 (0 hits). baseline_30d: 305 bets, ROI=-0.4413 (12 hits, 3.9% hit rate) — deteriorated from previous +0.235 as window shifted (2026-03-11 to 2026-04-09). Trials 01-05 all had daily ROI=-1.0 (0 hits), failing adoption condition. T01 (min_top_win=0.70): daily 3 bets ROI=-1.0. T02 (min_top_win=0.68): daily 5 bets ROI=-1.0. T03 (max_odds=50): daily 6 bets ROI=-1.0 (identical to baseline). T04 (min_ev=0.10): daily 6 bets ROI=-1.0 (identical). T05 (min_top_win=0.70+max_odds=55): daily 3 bets ROI=-1.0. On 2026-04-09, none of the 6 baseline candidates won, so no filter adjustment can improve single-day ROI. Note: 30d baseline is negative again (-0.441 vs -0.309 in 2026-04-07) — T01 (min_top_win=0.70) might recover 30d if positive daily ROI is achievable; monitor next days. odds_refresh.remaining_missing=24 (2026-04-02 venue 12 + 2026-04-04 venue 12).

NO IMPROVEMENT. baseline_daily: 8 bets, ROI=-1.0 (0 hits). baseline_30d: 232 bets, ROI=+0.0966 (12 hits, 5.17% hit rate) — now positive again (2026-03-12 to 2026-04-10 window). Trials 01-05 all had daily ROI=-1.0 (0 hits), failing the 単日 ROI > baseline condition. T01 (min_top_win=0.70): daily 6 bets ROI=-1.0, 30d 120 bets ROI=-0.29 — worse than baseline +0.097. T02 (min_top_win=0.68): daily 6 bets ROI=-1.0. T03 (max_odds=50): daily 7 bets ROI=-1.0. T04 (min_top_win=0.60): daily 9 bets ROI=-1.0, 30d 361 bets ROI=+0.026 — worse than baseline +0.097 though more bets. T05 (required_second_lane=0): daily 18 bets ROI=-1.0. On 2026-04-10, all bets under all configurations lost — no filter adjustment can improve single-day ROI when no candidates win. Key observation: baseline 30d is positive (+0.097, 232 bets) — current strategy performing well overall. T01 (min_top_win=0.70) hurts 30d ROI (−0.29 vs +0.097), confirming min_top_win=0.70 is too aggressive when baseline is positive. Strategy unchanged. odds_refresh.remaining_missing=25 (2026-04-02 venue 12 + 2026-04-04 venue 12 + prior 1).

IMPROVEMENT ADOPTED. min_expected_value=1.5 added to overrides. Baseline single-day ROI=3.229 (14 bets, 1 hit at odds 59.2). T02 improved daily ROI to 6.4 (8 bets, 1 hit, 12.5% hit rate, profit=5120). 30d ROI improved from 0.360 (207 bets, 13 hits) to 0.816 (116 bets, 9 hits, 7.8%). EV filter cuts low-quality bets while retaining high-EV candidates. T01(min_ev=1.2): daily 3.554, 30d 0.418 — eligible but weaker. T03(min_top=0.68): daily 5.578 but 30d 0.179 < baseline, rejected. T04(min_top=0.70): daily -1.0, rejected. T05(min_top=0.68+min_ev=1.5): daily 10.84, 30d 0.664 — eligible but lower 30d than T02. odds_refresh.remaining_missing=12 (2026-04-04 venue 12 still missing).
